name: regression-credit-inverted-ownership
documentText: Germany (English) ✕ Close Spotify General Terms of Use Status: 15.02.2024 1 Introduction, Access to Spotify Services 2 Amendments to the Agreement 3 Spotify Services offered 4 Paid Subscriptions, Right of Withdrawal, Billing and Termination of Paid Subscriptions 5 Rights We Grant You 6 Contents and Rights of Intellectual Property 7 User Policy 8 Restrictions and Changes to Spotify Services 9 Brand Accounts 10 Customer Service, Information, questions and complaints 11 Export control 12 Term and termination 13 Warranty 14 Limitation of liability 15 Third-party rights 16 Severability clause, waiver and interpretation 17 Assignment 18 Indemnity 19 Choice of law and Place of Jurisdiction 1 Introduction, Access to Spotify Services Please read these Terms of Use (“General Terms of Use”) carefully, as they are your use (including access to) of Spotify’s personalized music and other music streaming services. Content, including the related websites and software applications (together the "Spotify Services"), as well as the music, videos, podcasts, audiobooks or other content or materials provided by the Spotify services ("Content"). Certain Spotify services options are offered free of charge, while other options require payment before they can be used (the "Paid Subscriptions"). To meet the cancellation period, it is sufficient for you to send the notification of the exercise of the right of withdrawal before the end of the cancellation period. If you have acquired a paid subscription by using a code, your subscription will automatically end at the end of the period specified in the code or if the prepaid credit is not sufficient to pay for the Spotify services. 5 Rights that we grant you Spotify or Spotify's licensors are the sole owners of all rights to the Spotify services or the content. With the exception of the rights expressly granted to you in the agreement, Spotify does not grant you any rights, claims or shares in the Spotify services or content. You may terminate this License at any time subject to the terms of this paragraph by canceling the agreement with us. Without prejudice to the above, Spotify will give you payments to Spotify in advance for paid subscriptions and Spotify will pay these paid subscriptions before the pre-paid period (defined in Section 4.1) stipulates that these General Terms of Use are permanently reimbursed in advance for the prepaid period of the prepaid period after the hiring. If Spotify has already informed a user of the purchase of the reward, Spotify can nevertheless deny the user the reward for important reasons. Furthermore, the right to terminate the agreement and the right to withdraw from the agreement as well as the right to agree to a change, to waive or to resolve the agreement is not subject to the consent of another person. Apple and the Apple Subsidiaries are beneficiaries of this Agreement and, upon your consent to this Agreement, Apple will be granted (and it is considered to be Apple) to enforce this Agreement as the Beneficiary of this Agreement against you.
expectedReason: Captured from a real session where the model emitted a user_retains_content_ownership credit for a quote whose actual subject is the service ('the service and its licensors are the sole owners'). The new credit-inverse guard must drop that credit, leaving credits: [] and the document with no false A grade. All six AI flags here are also misclassifications that the existing keyword guards already reject.
